title: The Legendary Golden Smoothie
style: glossy vibrant 3D animated feature-film look, Pixar-meets-neon, physically based rendering, cinematic color grading with rich teal-and-magenta neon, volumetric haze and light, crisp micro-detail, playful AI-slop internet-cartoon energy

benny.name: Benny
benny.voice: an upbeat, cocky, energetic young male voice
benny.short: full human body with a yellow banana head, yellow bomber jacket and jeans
benny.desc: Benny, a humanoid-fruit character: a full realistic human male body with an average athletic build wearing a bright yellow bomber jacket, a white t-shirt, blue jeans and red high-top sneakers, BUT instead of a human head he has a large smooth yellow BANANA for a head (a big banana curved upward, with two big friendly cartoon eyes and a wide confident grin on the front). Cocky, energetic posture

straw.name: Straw
straw.voice: a dry, deadpan, skeptical young female voice
straw.short: full human body with a red strawberry head, denim jacket and green skirt
straw.desc: Straw, a humanoid-fruit character: a full realistic human female body, slim, wearing a denim jacket, a green skirt and white sneakers, BUT instead of a human head she has a big round red STRAWBERRY for a head (dotted with tiny yellow seeds, a small green leafy crown on top, two big expressive eyes and a small mouth). Deadpan, skeptical posture

coco.name: Coco
coco.voice: a deep, gruff, gravelly older male voice
coco.short: burly full human body with a brown coconut head and a white bartender apron
coco.desc: Coco, a humanoid-fruit character: a full realistic burly muscular human male body with broad shoulders and forearms, wearing a white bartender apron over a grey rolled-sleeve t-shirt, BUT instead of a human head he has a big rough brown hairy COCONUT for a head (with two eyes and a gruff mouth on the front). Gruff bartender

smoothie.desc: THE LEGENDARY GOLDEN SMOOTHIE: a tall clear glass cup filled with a luminous glowing liquid-gold smoothie that emits soft golden sparkles and light, topped with a curly gold straw and a tiny glowing fruit garnish

street.base: FRUIT CITY street at night: a neon-lit street where the skyscrapers are giant stylized fruits, glowing pink-and-cyan neon signs shaped like oranges, grapes and pineapples, neon signs reading 'JUICY NEON MARKET' and 'MELON ARCADE', wet reflective pavement and little market stalls

views.wide: a wide cinematic establishing shot looking straight down the middle of the street, deep perspective
views.cu: a low-angle medium shot from street level looking up, the towering neon fruit signs glowing and streaking behind, wet asphalt reflections in the foreground

juicebar.base: interior of 'THE SQUEEZE', a cozy neon juice bar: a polished wooden bar counter, a back wall of glowing bottles of colorful juice, hanging Edison bulbs, a chrome blender on the counter, a big pink neon sign reading 'THE SQUEEZE', a chalkboard menu and a few bar stools

views.front: seen from the customer side: a medium-wide shot facing the bar counter, the glowing bottle wall and the neon 'THE SQUEEZE' sign
views.behind: the REVERSE angle from BEHIND the bar on the bartender's side, looking out across the counter toward the stools and the entrance
views.counter: a tight low macro-friendly angle down on the polished counter surface and a couple of stools, warm neon rim light and shallow depth of field
views.corner: a wide shot from a far corner of the room showing more of the interior, side tables, the hanging bulbs and the bar off to one side

rooftop.base: a rooftop terrace at night overlooking the glowing Fruit City skyline of giant neon fruit skyscrapers, string lights overhead, a low railing, potted plants and a deep blue starry sky

views.wide: a wide cinematic hero shot with the neon fruit skyline filling the background and the terrace floor in the foreground

shots.camera: wide establishing two-shot; a slow cinematic crane-down easing into a gentle push-in along the wet neon street; anamorphic 35mm look with deep neon bokeh and a faint handheld sway
shots.atmosphere: rain-slicked pavement mirroring pink and cyan neon, drifting steam from a street vent, cool night key light with warm neon rim
shots.ambient: night city crowd murmur, distant traffic, a faint neon buzz and dripping water
shots.keyframe: Benny throws both arms up in excitement mid-street while Straw stands beside him arms folded, unimpressed, both full-body and small in a grand neon cityscape
shots.action: Benny sweeps his arms wide toward the glowing skyline in a big hype gesture; Straw slowly rolls her eyes

dialogue.line: Straw, today we find the legendary golden smoothie!
Benny, that is literally just a myth.

shots.camera: low-angle dolly-in tightening to a determined close-up of Benny's banana face as he strides toward camera; 50mm, shallow focus, neon signs streaking softly out of focus behind him
shots.atmosphere: hard magenta rim light raking across Benny, reflective wet asphalt flaring below, shallow depth isolating him
shots.ambient: confident footsteps splashing on wet pavement, low city hum
shots.keyframe: a low-angle close-up of Benny mid-stride, jaw set with determination, towering neon fruit signs blazing behind him
shots.action: Benny strides forward with growing determination and points ahead as the camera pushes in on his face

dialogue.line: I can feel it, Straw. Today is the day.

shots.camera: smooth Steadicam track following the pair up to the bar counter, settling into a medium-wide two-shot; warm Edison-bulb key with cool neon fill, shallow depth
shots.atmosphere: cozy amber bulbs versus the cold glow of the juice-bottle wall, soft bloom on the 'THE SQUEEZE' neon
shots.ambient: quiet bar-room tone, the clink of glasses, a low fridge hum
shots.keyframe: Benny leans confidently on the wooden bar counter pointing forward while Straw stands just behind him looking unimpressed
shots.action: Benny slaps the counter and leans in eagerly; Straw sighs and folds her arms behind him

shots.camera: reverse over-the-shoulder from behind the bar, a slow push toward the glowing smoothie with a rack focus pulling from Coco's face to the drink; 40mm, golden glow blooming into the lens
shots.atmosphere: the golden smoothie is the brightest thing in frame, throwing warm light up onto Coco's coconut face against the cool neon
shots.ambient: a low bar-room hum, the soft clink of the glass on the counter, and a gentle magical shimmer sound effect as the smoothie glows
shots.keyframe: from behind the bar, Coco sets the glowing Legendary Golden Smoothie on the counter, its light on his face, as Benny watches from the customer side across the counter
shots.action: Coco slides the glowing golden smoothie forward across the counter and cocks a skeptical eyebrow at Benny

dialogue.line: You sure you can handle it, kid?

shots.camera: open on a macro insert of the curly gold straw and glowing liquid, then tilt up into a close-up of Benny's astonished banana face; 85mm, buttery bokeh, tiny golden sparkles drifting
shots.atmosphere: intimate warm golden pool of light on the counter, everything else falling into soft neon darkness
shots.ambient: one loud comedic slurp through the straw and a short sparkly magical shimmer sound effect as it hits, otherwise a quiet room
shots.keyframe: a tight low angle on the counter: Benny lifts the glowing golden smoothie to his banana-face with both hands, eyes wide with anticipation, golden light reflecting on him
shots.action: Benny takes one big dramatic sip through the gold straw and his eyes go huge with amazement

shots.camera: low-angle slow tilt-up combined with a gentle orbit as Benny lifts off the floor haloed in golden light; widens from medium to wide, volumetric god-rays, Straw small in the foreground looking up
shots.atmosphere: golden light and floating sparks fill the room, long dramatic shadows, the neon bar cool behind the warm glow
shots.ambient: soft airy whooshes and light popping sparkle sound effects (discrete foley, not musical)
shots.keyframe: in the corner of the bar, Benny floats a little off the floor glowing with golden light and sparkles, arms spread triumphantly, while Straw stares up at him astonished
shots.action: Benny hovers in the air wreathed in golden sparkles, arms spread; Straw gasps and points up at him

dialogue.line: I have never felt more alive!

shots.camera: a rising crane that booms up and back into a wide hero shot over the neon skyline as the three clink glasses; 28mm, string-light bokeh, a brief slow-motion feel on the clink
shots.atmosphere: warm string lights over cool city neon, gentle night haze, the golden smoothies glowing like little lanterns
shots.ambient: a gentle night breeze, distant city hum and a bright glass clink
shots.keyframe: on the rooftop terrace over the glowing Fruit City skyline, Benny, Straw and Coco stand together each holding a glowing golden smoothie, raising them for a toast, all three full-body
shots.action: the three friends raise and clink their glowing golden smoothies together in a happy toast over the neon skyline
